name: oh-my-gjc
description: oh-my-gajaecode — one plugin, everything. A single install brings 10 trigger-word skills + 15 commands (/omg + 14 /omg:*), all surfaced natively as /omg:* commands and trigger-word skills: easy-answer (plain-language final answers), gate-briefing (domain-blind approval-gate briefings), plain-layer (choice translation + post-interview conversational spec polish + gate delegation via /omg:plain), model preset sol (low-latency codex+opus custom; quality/emergency/safety lanes via gjc built-ins opus-codex/codex-medium/codex-pro/fable-opus-codex; session default=sol; auto-merged into models.yml at native install), extragoal (external fresh-context cross-family final review gate), release-gate (3-gate release ceremony: verify → fresh-context cross-review VERDICT → human approval, never self-approved; /omg:release), branch-flow (per-repo dev/main git discipline in the repo's AGENTS.md + docs/WORKFLOW.md, + git-worktree parallel sessions via /omg:worktree), lazycodex-gjc (isolated external Codex+LazyCodex worker with no child GJC session), session toggles + always-on semaphores (~/.gjc/agent/SYSTEM.md marker blocks), /omg:fable (Fable 5 adversarial safety audit), /omg:insane-review (GPT-5.6 Sol Pro web review), /omg:bugwatch-scan (gjc bug collector), and /omg:setup for optional model-preset merge + always-on toggles. Prerequisite-gated capabilities self-diagnose at first run; install stays light.
